expectations.evidence: hook_cron queries nodes and calls createItem()

expectations.text: Queue name matches QueueWorker plugin ID
processItem() has try/catch distinguishing retryable vs permanent
expectations.evidence: Has try/catch with logging but does NOT distinguish retryable (RequeueException) from permanent (SuspendQueueException)
